home.heroDesc: The best messenger of all time. Chat with friends, give gifts, and share photos, videos, and voice messages.

register.title: Registration —
register.desc: Registration is very simple. Enter your phone number and wait for the code to be sent. Then simply enter it.

information.title: Information —
information.desc: Your first and last name are required for your account. To be recognized, you must complete these two fields.

auth.title: Authorization —
auth.desc: Authorization is very simple. Enter your phone number and wait for the code to be sent. Then simply enter it.

password.title: Password —
password.desc: A cloud password is one way to protect your account. Please enter your cloud password to authorize.

profileComplete.title: Complete your profile.
profileComplete.desc: Filling out your profile is one of the basic functions of our messenger. If you'd like to share information about yourself, this section is for you.
